statements.sql: select exists (select 1 from information_schema.tables where table_schema = schema() and table_name = 'sm_general_settings' and table_type in ('BASE TABLE', 'SYSTEM VERSIONED')) as `exists`
select exists (select 1 from information_schema.tables where table_schema = schema() and table_name = 'users' and table_type in ('BASE TABLE', 'SYSTEM VERSIONED')) as `exists`
select * from `users` where `role_id` = 1 and `school_id` = 1 limit 1
select * from `users` where `role_id` = 1 and `school_id` = 1 limit 1
select * from `sm_time_zones` where `sm_time_zones`.`id` = 51 limit 1
select * from `maintenance_settings` limit 1
select * from `sm_general_settings` where `school_id` = 1 limit 1
select * from `sm_currencies` where `sm_currencies`.`code` in ('USD')
select * from `infixedu__pages` where `school_id` = 1 and `home_page` = 1 limit 1
select * from `sm_general_settings` where `school_id` = 1 limit 1
select * from `sm_currencies` where `sm_currencies`.`code` in ('USD')
select `id`, `name`, `title`, `description`, `slug`, `settings`, `status`, `home_page` from `infixedu__pages` where `school_id` = 1 and `slug` = 'home' and `status` = 'published' limit 1
select `id`, `name`, `title`, `description`, `slug`, `settings`, `status`, `school_id` from `infixedu__pages` where `school_id` = 1 and `name` = 'header_menu' limit 1
select `id`, `name`, `title`, `description`, `slug`, `settings`, `status`, `school_id`, `school_id` from `infixedu__pages` where `school_id` = 1 and `name` = 'footer_menu' limit 1
select * from `home_sliders` where `school_id` = 1 limit 3
select * from `sm_notice_boards` where `publish_on` <= '2026-04-09' and `is_published` = 1 and `school_id` = 1 and `sm_notice_boards`.`active_status` = 1 order by `id` asc limit 7
select `date_format_id` from `sm_general_settings` where `id` = 1 limit 1
select `format` from `sm_date_formats` where `id` = 1 limit 1
select * from `sm_photo_galleries` where `parent_id` is null and `school_id` = 1 order by `position` asc
select count(*) as aggregate from `sm_photo_galleries` where `school_id` = 1
select * from `sm_video_galleries` where `school_id` = 1 order by `position` asc limit 3
select * from `speech_sliders` where `school_id` = 1 limit 4
select * from `sm_expert_teachers` where `school_id` = 1 order by `position` asc limit 4
select * from `sm_staffs` where `sm_staffs`.`id` in (34, 73, 107, 127) and `sm_staffs`.`active_status` = 1
select * from `sm_designations` where `sm_designations`.`id` in (1) and `sm_designations`.`active_status` = 1
select count(*) as aggregate from `sm_courses` where `school_id` = 1
select * from `sm_courses` where `school_id` = 1 order by `id` asc limit 4
select * from `sm_course_categories` where `sm_course_categories`.`id` in (2, 4)
select `id`, `from_date`, `to_date`, `event_title`, `event_location` from `sm_events` where `school_id` = 1 and `sm_events`.`active_status` = 1 limit 2
select `name`, `designation`, `institution_name`, `image`, `description`, `star_rating`, `school_id` from `sm_testimonials` where `school_id` = 1 order by `id` asc limit 3
select * from `sm_news` where `school_id` = 1 and `status` = 1 and `mark_as_archive` = 0 order by `id` asc limit 3

select `id`, `notice_title`, `notice_date`, `is_published` from `sm_notice_boards` where `publish_on` <= '2026-04-09' and `is_published` = 1 and `school_id` = 1 and `sm_notice_boards`.`active_status` = 1 limit 2
